stemHtml: All other things being equal, if a take-off is performed with a headwind component, the take-off distance is...

options.a: reduced, because the lift-off speed is reached earlier.
options.b: the same, because the ground speed is not relevant.
options.c: increased, because the headwind prevents the aircraft from accelerating.
options.d: the same, because it only depends on the air density.
